description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:17.11.0-ce image with a docker:dind service, defines a REPO_NAME variable, and has two stages: test and build. In the test stage add a test job that runs on the golang:latest image and executes: export JIRA_DOMAIN=\"jira.society.com\", export JIRA_PORT=80, mkdir -p $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME, mv $CI_PROJECT_DIR/* $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME, cd $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME, go get -t ./..., go test ./.... In the build stage add a build job that runs docker login -u \"$CI_REGISTRY_USER\" -p \"$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD\" $CI_REGISTRY, docker build --pull -t \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE\" . and docker push \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE\". No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
